title: Create immutable archive evidence root
outOfScope: Changing unrelated Work Item gate policy

sources.reason: Defines the immutable archive manifest acceptance criteria.
Current archive/index mutation order and hash behavior.
End-to-end archive rollback and evidence coverage.

riskAssessment.reason: The change is confined to deterministic archive evidence generation and compatibility checks.

executionDecision.reason: The user authorized the complete serial remediation plan and this deterministic evidence change is ready.

preReviewWarnings: Verify the manifest excludes self-referential fields and remains stable across repeated generation.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: Archive manifest freezes Contract and Summary digests without self-reference.
Archive index entries reference the manifest digest and do not form a repair cycle.
Generated cockpit status is excluded from the immutable evidence chain.
Repeated archive generation is deterministic and legacy archives remain readable.
Regression tests cover tampering, self-reference, and legacy compatibility.
guidelines: New public APIs must be documented.
Do not import internal modules from other features.

intent.problem: Archive completion currently rewrites Contract paths, Summary fields, Index entries, and hashes in a coupled sequence that requires manual repairs and can create circular evidence.
constraints: Keep archived Contract and Summary authoritative.
Do not include generated current_status.md in the immutable chain.
Preserve compatibility with legacy archives lacking a manifest.
intent.rationale: Generate one immutable manifest from frozen evidence in a fixed order, then let discovery metadata reference that root rather than re-deriving the evidence graph.

rawUserRequest: 继续执行评审整改计划工单 8：建立 Immutable Archive Evidence Root，并按完整 PR、合并、清理分支流程循环到全部任务完成。

declaredIntent.summary: Make archived evidence discoverable through a stable immutable manifest root.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: Archive creates manifest with stable Contract and Summary digests
Manifest self-reference and digest tampering fail closed
Generated status is excluded from immutable chain
Legacy archive without manifest remains readable

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: The user explicitly authorized the complete serial remediation plan.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
